mission.title: Install and Configure Grafana Operator
mission.description: The Grafana Operator is a Kubernetes operator that simplifies the management of Grafana instances, dashboards, and data sources using Kubernetes Custom Resources (CRs). It is ideal for users who prefer GitOps workflows or infrastructure as code approaches. Key trade-offs include the need for familiarity with Kubernetes CRs and potential complexity in managing multiple instances.

steps.title: Add the Grafana Helm repository
steps.description:
This step adds the Grafana Helm chart repository to your Helm configuration, allowing you to install the Grafana Operator.

```bash

helm repo add grafana-operator oci://ghcr.io/grafana/helm-charts

helm repo update

```

> This command sets up the repository for Grafana Operator.
> Updates the local Helm chart repository cache.

steps.title: Install the Grafana Operator
steps.description:
This command installs the Grafana Operator in your Kubernetes cluster using the specified version.

```bash

helm upgrade -i grafana-operator oci://ghcr.io/grafana/helm-charts/grafana-operator --version 5.22.2

```

> Installs the Grafana Operator with the latest stable version.

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check if the Grafana Operator is running correctly in the cluster.

```bash

kubectl get pods -n default

kubectl get deployment grafana-operator -n default

```

> Replace 'default' with the namespace where the operator is installed if different.
> Verifies that the Grafana Operator deployment is available.

steps.title: Create a Grafana instance
steps.description:
This step creates a Grafana instance using a custom resource definition (CRD).

```bash

kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: grafana.integreatly.org/v1beta1
kind: Grafana
metadata:
  name: grafana
spec:
  config:
    log:
      mode: "console"
    security:
      admin_user: root
      admin_password: <REDACTED>
EOF

```

> Creates a simple Grafana instance with admin credentials.
commands:
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: grafana.integreatly.org/v1beta1
kind: Grafana
metadata:
  name: grafana
spec:
  config:
    log:
      mode: "console"
    security:
      admin_user: root
      admin_password: <REDACTED>
EOF

steps.title: Verify the Grafana instance
steps.description:
Check if the Grafana instance is running and ready.

```bash

kubectl get grafana

kubectl describe grafana grafana

```

> Lists all Grafana instances and their statuses.
> Describes the Grafana instance for detailed information.

uninstall.title: Uninstall the Grafana Operator
uninstall.description:
This step removes the Grafana Operator from the cluster. Be aware that this may lead to loss of Grafana instances and associated resources.

```bash

helm uninstall grafana-operator

kubectl delete grafana grafana

```

> Uninstalls the Grafana Operator.
> Deletes the Grafana instance created earlier.

upgrade.title: Upgrade the Grafana Operator
upgrade.description:
Backup the current configuration, upgrade the operator, and verify the upgrade.

```bash

kubectl get grafana -o yaml > grafana-backup.yaml

helm upgrade grafana-operator oci://ghcr.io/grafana/helm-charts/grafana-operator --version 5.22.2

kubectl get pods -n default

```

> Backs up the current Grafana instance configuration.
> Upgrades the Grafana Operator to the specified version.
> Verifies that the upgraded Grafana Operator is running.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'Error: unable to recognize "": no matches for kind "Grafana" in version "grafana.integreatly.org/v1beta1"'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The Grafana CRD may not be installed or registered correctly.

**Fix:**
Ensure the Grafana Operator is installed and the CRDs are applied: `kubectl apply -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/grafana/grafana-operator/main/deploy/crds/grafana.integreatly.org_grafanas.yaml`.

troubleshooting.title: Pod is in CrashLoopBackOff state.
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The Grafana instance may have misconfigured settings or insufficient resources.

**Fix:**
Check the pod logs with `kubectl logs <pod-name>` and adjust the configuration or resources accordingly.

troubleshooting.title: Grafana instance not accessible.
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The service may not be exposed correctly or the ingress may not be configured.

**Fix:**
Ensure the service type is set to LoadBalancer or NodePort, and check ingress configurations.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'Failed to install CRD: grafanas.integreatly.org already exists'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The CRD for Grafana is already installed.

**Fix:**
Use `kubectl get crd` to check existing CRDs and skip CRD installation if already present.

versionNotes.changes: Added support for new Grafana features and improved CRD handling.
versionNotes.migrationSteps: No specific migration steps required for this version.

resolution.summary: You should see the Grafana instance running with the status 'Running' and the Grafana dashboard accessible via the configured service.
codeSnippets:

apiVersion: grafana.integreatly.org/v1beta1
kind: Grafana
metadata:
  name: grafana
spec:
  config:
    log:
      mode: "console"
    security:
      admin_user: root
      admin_password: <REDACTED>
EOF

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running with the necessary tools installed.
